turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. I want to know — do you offer any senior citizen discounts on consultations?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes! We have a 15% concession on consultation fees for senior citizens above the age of 65.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's kind. And for diagnostics and lab tests?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For lab tests there's a 10% senior citizen discount on our standard price list. Some packages already have discounted rates inclusive.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: What ID proof is needed to avail this?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Any government-issued ID showing your date of birth — Aadhaar, PAN, voter ID, or senior citizen card — is acceptable at the billing counter.
